name: CommitLLM: A Fine-Tuned Pipeline for Git Commit Message Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.17532v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Developers frequently write uninformative git commit messages such as "fix" or "update stuff", degrading the value of version-control history for c...
description: arXiv:2607.17532v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Developers frequently write uninformative git commit messages such as "fix" or "update stuff", degrading the value of version-control history for code review, debugging, and onboarding. We present CommitLLM, a three-stage pipeline that generates concise, Conventional Commits-compliant messages from code diffs using a fine-tuned small language mo...
author: Md Rafid Haque, Poojan Narendrabhai Patel, Meetkumar Vijaybhai Raychura
